subcodes.first_line: Go forth with the Book of God unto His servants, then inform them of what thou hast witnessed and known, that they may gather together in remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذهب بکتاب الله الی عباده ثم اخبرهم بما رایت و عرفت لیجتمعن علی ذکر الله و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @contention and conflict
